Achaea Help Files
Achaea has hundreds of help files to you learn about Achaea. This is a copy of the in-game help file structure. HELP in-game will show you this same menu.
Help:
[
Return to Help Index
]
9.46 COMPOSITION
From the vast diaspora of musical traditions in
Achaea
, the Great
Bard
coalesced the
skill
of
Composition
. It is the apogee of mortal talent,
weaving
many disparate traditions the
world
over into cohesive performances that can as easily
move
a heart as break one.
This
power
flows from the Place of Eternal Song through the instrument of the Bard such that
Sapience
will never again forget the significance of Art or its impact.
As dangerous as music can be, however, remember that it is the
ability
to make
history
that makes for true
might
.
Achaea is developed and published by
Iron Realms Entertainment.
